calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change and Gender Change of Minor:
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Steven Sechovec and Devon Warner; father and mother of minor present in court. Minor Phoebe R. Warner - Sechovec present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined.
Physician's declaration on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Phoebe R. Warner - Sechovec to Warner Apolo Sechovec; and gender change from female to male.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Denied
